---
pagetitle: "Field Notes — Matthew Zhou"
description-meta: "Code × data × AI — weekly field notes from Matthew Zhou on building for the web, measuring what matters, and applying AI/ML."
page-layout: article
listing:
  id: recent
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  template: listing.ejs
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: true
  fields: [date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
---

```{=html}
<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-grid">
    <div class="hero-main">
      <p class="tag3"><span class="c">code</span><span class="x">×</span><span class="d">data</span><span class="x">×</span><span class="a">AI</span></p>
      <h1 class="hero-title">Field&nbsp;Notes</h1>
      <p class="hero-sub">Building for the web, measuring what matters, and applying <strong>AI/ML</strong> — working notes from the intersection, one a week.</p>
      <a class="hero-cta" href="#recent">read the notes</a>
    </div>
    <aside class="instrument">
      <p class="instr-ttl">instrument</p>
      <div class="instr-row"><span class="lab">cadence</span><span class="val">1 / week <span class="spark">▁▂▃▅▆▇</span></span></div>
      <div class="instr-row"><span class="lab">stack</span><span class="val">quarto · ga4</span></div>
      <div class="instr-row stacked"><span class="lab">focus</span><span class="pills"><span class="pill c">code</span><span class="pill d">data</span><span class="pill a">ai/ml</span></span></div>
    </aside>
  </div>
</section>
```
